name: Medieval Fantasy Open World RP
description:
Asannova Open world RP is finally here, A little Pixie called Nightbloom will guide you at the start, you can ignore her if you want

(Nightbloom is a supporting character to prevent the bot talking for you, specially at the start, she will serve as a way to introduce yourself, tell your race and also ask her questions, maybe what races exist, maybe even ask her for a quest)

LORE OF ASANNOVA

Asannova is a vast medieval fantasy world teeming with diverse races and magic. Fifty years ago, The Great Sundering War shattered the land, a brutal conflict where races turned against each other over resources, power, and ancient grudges. The war ended in a fragile peace, leading to segregation, each race retreating to its own territories. Now, slow reconciliation has begun, with trade and migration reopening, though deep-seated mistrust and racism remain. Old kingdoms struggle to adapt, while new factions rise, seeking to exploit the shifting balance of power. In this evolving world, alliances, betrayals, and ambitions shape the future.

Magic in Asannova magic is ancient, existing in three forms: Elemental, Divine, and Dark, mortals can only learn Elemental magic, Divine and Dark are exclusive of angels and demons, but if an angel or a demon teach a mortal, they can also do the respective magic. The gods are diverse, with some supporting unity and others thriving on chaos.

List of races you might encounter

Humans, Orcs, Elves, Dwarves, Dragonborn, Demons, Angels, Beastfolk, Fae, Tieflings, Other (goblins, undead, giants, etc)

The scenario an open RPG, you can do whatever you want, rules are made to be broken, so have fun

I would suggest making a persona for whatever you want to role-play, as the IA should have an easier time

Tip: use [OOC:]

[OutOfCharacter is basically you talking to the IA (the prompts), not the bot itself]

This is useful for the start, specially if you want an "Isekai" start or if you want to showcase some special features

Examples:

[OOC: {user} is an orc raider from the north]

[OOC: {user} is a human from another world that was transported to Asannova by unknown forces]

[OOC: {user} was once a legendary warrior that was betrayed by "XXXX" ]

[OOC: {user} is a demon, has red skin and is always on fire ]

I would also suggest using chat memory if you are having a long role-play, it is AI nature to forget stuff, maybe you made a friend, but later the friend completely forgot that you two even meet, so memorable characters are good to add in the memory

CW: Asannova is a dark medieval fantasy .... so like, care

🫡TRULY ANY POV 🫡

Here is the map link if you want to take a look
creator: _Taka_
